<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]][[de:Wasser-Schwein]][[hak:Kui-hoi]][[ja:癸亥]][[ko:계해]][[vi:Quý Hợi]][[za:Gveiqhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]][[zh-yue:癸亥]][[zh:癸亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]][[de:Wasser-Schwein]][[hak:Kui-hoi]][[ja:癸亥]][[ko:계해]][[vi:Quý Hợi]][[za:Gveiqhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]][[zh-yue:癸亥]][[zh:癸亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]][[de:Wasser-Schwein]][[hak:Kui-hoi]][[ja:癸亥]][[ko:계해]][[vi:Quý Hợi]][[za:Gveiqhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]][[zh-yue:癸亥]][[zh:癸亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Pig|kanji=癸亥|romaji=mizunoto i|onyomi=kigai|p=guǐhài|w=kuei-hai|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ xaɪ̯|y=gwai2 hoi6|j=gwai2 hoi6|ci=kʷɐi hɐi|mc=kjwɨj ɣəi|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Pig also known as 癸亥''' (mizu no toi, kisui no inoshishi, kigai) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 60th (last) combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Water Dog]] and followed by [[Yang Wood Rat]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Mizunoto (癸)]] represents yin [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], and the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig (亥)]] represents yin [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], forming a harmonious relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)]]).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Pig (癸亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kigai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyehae (계해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

<!--
==
* Yin Water Pig (癸亥) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのといのしし (mizunoto-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: きかのいのしし (kika-no-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: きがい (kigai)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyehae
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Hợi

-->
==Years of Yin Water Pig==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 3 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Water Pig]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Water Pig (癸亥)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 3|3 AD]]
* [[AD 63|63 AD]]
* [[AD 123|123 AD]]
* [[183|183 AD]]
* [[243|243 AD]]
* [[303|303 AD]]
* [[363|363 AD]]
* [[423|423 AD]]
* [[483|483 AD]]
* [[543|543 AD]]
* [[603|603 AD]]
* [[663|663 AD]]
* [[723|723 AD]]
* [[783|783 AD]]
* [[843|843 AD]]
* [[903|903 AD]]
* [[963|963 AD]]
|
* [[1023|1023 AD]]
* [[1083|1083 AD]]
* [[1143|1143 AD]]
* [[1203|1203 AD]]
* [[1263|1263 AD]]
* [[1323|1323 AD]]
* [[1383|1383 AD]]
* [[1443|1443 AD]]
* [[1503|1503 AD]]
* [[1563|1563 AD]]
* [[1623|1623 AD]]
* [[1683|1683 AD]]
* [[1743|1743 AD]]
* [[1803|1803 AD]]
* [[1863|1863 AD]]
* [[1923|1923 AD]]
* [[1983|1983 AD]]
|
* [[2043 AD]]
* [[2100s|2103 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2163 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2223 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2283 AD]]
* [[2343 AD]]
* [[2403 AD]]
* [[25th century|2463 AD]]
* [[2523 AD]]
* [[2583 AD]]
* [[2643 AD]]
* [[2703 AD]]
* [[2763 AD]]
* [[2823 AD]]
* [[2883 AD]]
* [[2943 AD]]
|}
==Months of Yin Water Pig==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoto (癸)]] or [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]]), the month of [[October]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Water Pig]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Pig==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Water Pig]] is the last day of [[Hassen]].

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chik]]
[[zh-yue:丁丑]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Pig|qq=ja|癸亥|version=84123860|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Feuer-Büffelvi]]
[[de:Yin Water Pig]]

[[ja:癸亥]]
[[zh:癸亥]]
[[ko:계해]]
[[fr:Cochon de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Schwein]]

[[af:Vuuros (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Büffelen]]
[[en:Fire Ox]]
[[fr:Buffle de feushak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:정축]]
[[vi:Đinh Sửu]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[zh:丁丑]]
[[ar:Yin Water Pig]]

<!--Yin Water Pig--><!--Yin Water Pig-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]]
[[hak:Kui-hoi]]
[[vi:Quý Hợi]]
[[za:Gveiqhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:癸亥]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Watervark (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-hâi]]
[[hak:Kui-hoi]]
[[vi:Quý Hợi]]
[[za:Gveiqhaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:癸亥]]
{{wikidata link|Q904914}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
